do: Use dark backgrounds (#000000) with white or light text for high contrast readability
Feature the Satoshi font family for all text elements to maintain brand consistency
Use rounded corners on all buttons, cards, and interface elements to match the brand's corner style
Write copy that addresses golf frustrations directly and positions coaching as the solution, using conversational tone like 'You've tried everything' or 'There's a better way'
dont: Use bright, colorful backgrounds or light mode aesthetics that contradict the dark visual mode
Create generic golf lesson ads - avoid positioning as traditional lessons since the brand specifically says 'You don't need another golf lesson'
Use sharp, square corners on buttons or design elements that go against the rounded corner style
Write overly formal or corporate copy - avoid being salesy and instead focus on understanding the golfer's pain points and frustrations
